name: research
description: Research DAG service — persistent cross-session research tracking with task graph and markdown snapshots

tools.name: research.start
tools.description: Start a new research session with a goal. Creates a research entry, sets it as the current research for the user, and adds initial skeleton tasks decomposed from the goal. Returns the research object.

goal.description: The research goal or question to investigate

title.description: Optional short title for the research (defaults to first 60 chars of goal)

tools.name: research.list
tools.description: List all research sessions for a user, newest first. Returns an array of research objects with id, title, goal, status, is_current, created_at, updated_at.

tools.name: research.switch
tools.description: Switch the active research session for a user to the specified research_id. Returns the updated research object.

tools.name: research.status
tools.description: Get the current research for a user along with all tasks and which tasks are currently runnable (pending with all dependencies done). Returns {research, tasks, runnable_tasks}.

tools.name: research.complete
tools.description: Mark the current research session for a user as complete. Updates status to 'complete' and writes a final snapshot.

tools.name: research.task_add
tools.description: Add a new task to the current research session. Returns the created task object.

depends_on.description: Optional list of task IDs this task depends on

parent_id.description: Optional parent task ID for hierarchical tasks

assigned_agent.description: Optional agent name to assign this task to

tools.name: research.task_done
tools.description: Mark a task as done with a result string. Updates status to 'done' and triggers a snapshot write.

task_id.description: Task ID to mark as done

result.description: Result or output from completing this task

tools.name: research.task_fail
tools.description: Mark a task as failed with a reason. Updates status to 'failed' and triggers a snapshot write.

task_id.description: Task ID to mark as failed
